title: Marketing Executive - No Experience Req
description:
Position: Marketing Executive
Location: Bugis
Working hours: Mon-Fri 9am-6pm
Salary (commensurate with experience): Up to $3400
Duration: Permanent
Industry: Health & Wellness Product

Main Responsibilities:

  • Manage and create content, visuals, and collateral for marketing campaigns
  • Create prospect database from multiple sources for demand generation
  • Online research and B2B prospecting
  • Create content for social media (digital marketing – YouTube, Facebook, WhatsApp, Instagram)
  • Image and video editing
  • Respond to customer enquiries and market company products
  • Update databases and share testimonials/reports with clients
  • Enhance and update company websites
  • Monitor enquiries and respond appropriately
  • Actively market and participate in company and third party seminars and conferences
  • Formulate and run marketing campaigns
  • Prompt and effective handling of client queries

Requirements:

  • Entry level or 1 year of marketing experience
  • Experience in digital marketing/online platform content creation
  • Possess good presentation and interpersonal skills
  • Expertise in MS Office, Photoshop, Canva, Adobe and other relevant visual creation software
  • Bilingual in English and Mandarin to liaise with Chinese clients who can converse in Mandarin only

Email to: kaying@searchpersonnel.com.sg for more information.

Do visit www.facebook.com/search.personnel for more job listings.

***We do not charge our candidates any referral fee nor bind them with any contract.***

Yapp Ka Ying (Ms)

Senior Consulting Manager

Reg no.: R1654474

EA No: 13C6684

postedCompany.description:
SEARCH PERSONNEL PRIVATE LIMITED

 

Search Personnel is an established, leading and reputable recruitment company that brings effective services to individuals and organisations with a sense of urgency and commitment.


The thought behind Search Personnel is to deliver a specialized, high quality recruitment service.


With Search Personnel you can expect a level of quality and professionalism from experts who know recruitment and understand the market. With a team of experienced recruitment consultants, we can exploit into years of local recruitment experience and expertise. This enables us to bring the best roles and the best candidates together.


Our Services:

  • Executive Search (Headhunting)
  • Permanent Staffing
  • Payroll Processing Service
  • Contract Staffing
  • Temporary Staffing and Casual Workers
  • Foreign Recruitment (Overseas placements)

Awarded:
SME100 Awards 2020 - Singapore's Fast Moving Companies


Awarded:

  • Best Recruitment Portal – (Singapore) – Bronze in 2019
  • Best Staffing Firm – (Singapore) – Bronze in 2020
  • Best Mid-Management Recruitment Firm – (Singapore) – Bronze in 2020
  • Best Recruitment Firm – Mid-management roles RM8000 - RM15000 per month (Malaysia) – Gold in 2017 and Bronze in 2020
  • Best Recruitment Firm – Non-management roles under RM8000 per month (Malaysia) – Silver in 2018
  • Best Executive Search Firm – (Malaysia) – Bronze Award in 2019 and 2020

Voted by our valued clients and the public, HR Vendors of the Year Awards is one of Asia’s largest award shows dedicated to celebrating the achievements of organizations that do their best in serving the HR professionals.


We are not only providing recruitment services but also solutions to employers in talent management, from employee’s on-boarding, performance management, to retention.


Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Search Personnel Private Limited for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

hiringCompany.description:
We are a health and wellness team that work with superior health solutions to help our clients achieve health and mental well-being.


With preventable health conditions rising to epidemic levels globally, we want to partner with our clients in making the right choices.


There are over 500 epidemiologic studies that show that consuming the correct nutrients actually give health benefits.


The right choices made by us on nutrients can result in natural healing and optimal health that makes living joyous and meaningful.


Nutrition plays an important role in virtually every medical condition. It follows that correcting nutritional imbalances is fundamental to the prevention and treatment of many medical condition.
hiringCompany.name: BIO MEADOWS PTE. LTD.
